name: runbooks
description: Operational runbooks for CVE Matter-Analysis OS - Standard procedures for deployment, troubleshooting, and maintenance
purpose: Provide step-by-step procedures for common operational tasks and incident response

initial_setup.title: Initial Deployment Setup
initial_setup.description: Deploy CVE Matter-Analysis OS for the first time
steps: Clone repository and checkout main branch
Push images to GCR: `docker push gcr.io/PROJECT_ID/lidlift:latest`
initial_setup.rollback: Run `terraform destroy` and `kubectl delete -f k8s/` if needed

update_deployment.title: Update Existing Deployment
update_deployment.description: Deploy new version to existing infrastructure
steps: Build new Docker image with version tag
Update k8s manifests with new image tag
Run `kubectl diff -f k8s/` to preview changes

high_error_rate.title: Troubleshooting High Error Rate
high_error_rate.description: Diagnose and resolve elevated error rates in the pipeline
investigation_steps: Check H-MOC run report for failed stages
Check pod status: `kubectl get pods -n cve-analysis`
Verify NVD API status and rate limits
Check resource utilization: CPU, memory, disk
Review recent changes in Git history
Check external dependencies (NVD API, storage, etc.)

nvd_api_rate_limit.resolution: Increase backoff delay or add API key

resource_exhaustion.resolution: Increase resource limits in k8s manifests

data_quality.resolution: Check data schema and add additional validation

network_issues.resolution: Check network policies and firewall rules

high_error_rate.resolution: Apply appropriate fix based on root cause, then monitor for 1 hour
high_error_rate.escalation: If unresolved after 2 hours, escalate to senior SRE

performance_degradation.title: Performance Degradation
performance_degradation.description: Address slow processing times or reduced throughput
investigation_steps: Analyze slow query logs if applicable
Check for background jobs or maintenance tasks

database_slowdown.resolution: Check indexes, optimize queries, or scale database

performance_degradation.resolution: Apply scaling or optimization, validate throughput returns to baseline
performance_degradation.escalation: If performance does not improve within 1 hour, escalate to engineering team

alignment_failure.title: Alignment Quality Below Threshold
alignment_failure.description: Handle cases where R² falls below configured threshold
investigation_steps: Check H-MOC report for alignment metrics
Review input data quality and distribution
Check for data drift using refractor module
Review recent changes to embedding generation

distributional_shift.resolution: Update reference embeddings with recent data

bad_input_data.symptom: Anomalies in CVE descriptions or metadata
bad_input_data.resolution: Filter out problematic CVEs, improve validation

threshold_too_strict.symptom: Consistently failing alignment despite good results
threshold_too_strict.resolution: Review and adjust R² threshold if appropriate

alignment_failure.resolution: Apply fix and reprocess affected CVE batch
alignment_failure.escalation: If alignment issues persist, escalate to ML engineering team

model_retraining.title: Arbiter Model Retraining
model_retraining.description: Periodic retraining of the stacked arbiter model
steps: Export recent CVE data with ground truth labels
Prepare training dataset with validation split
Compare metrics with previous model (accuracy, F1, etc.)
If improved, deploy new model to staging
Deploy to production if tests pass
model_retraining.rollback: Restore previous model from backup if performance degrades

reference_embedding_update.title: Update Reference Embeddings
reference_embedding_update.description: Refresh reference embeddings for alignment module
reference_embedding_update.frequency: Quarterly or when alignment quality degrades
steps: Collect recent CVE sample spanning multiple categories
Copy new embeddings to reference location
Monitor alignment R² for next 24 hours
reference_embedding_update.rollback: Restore previous reference embeddings if alignment quality drops

database_maintenance.title: Database Maintenance
steps: Run VACUUM and ANALYZE on PostgreSQL (if applicable)
Check and rebuild indexes if needed

security_vulnerability.title: Security Vulnerability Discovered
security_vulnerability.description: Response to security vulnerability in dependencies or code
immediate_actions: Check if vulnerability is actively exploited
steps: Deploy to production if tests pass
validation: Vulnerability no longer detected by scanners

data_breach_suspected.title: Suspected Data Breach
data_breach_suspected.description: Response to potential unauthorized data access
immediate_actions: Do NOT make changes that might destroy evidence
Notify security team and legal counsel
data_breach_suspected.escalation: Critical - immediate escalation to CISO and legal team
data_breach_suspected.communication: Follow legal and compliance requirements for disclosure
